pi_items.source: Task description instruction: 'Disable the ability for users to delete their own messages ('Allow Message Deleting').'
Task description instruction: 'Ensure users CAN still edit their messages'
Task description instruction: 'restrict this editing window to 10 minutes after posting'
Task description instruction: 'Enable 'Keep Message History' to ensure the database retains original versions of edited messages.'

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically configured Rocket.Chat settings. The required message retention parameters (Allow Deleting: false, Allow Editing: true, Block Edit Minutes: 10, and Keep History: true) were explicitly verified by matching them against the task description instructions.
